# zstack_multicast_router (Resource)

Manages a multicast router in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `vpc_router_vm_uuid` (String) The UUID of the VPC router VM.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the multicast router.

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) The name of the multicast router.
- `state` (String) The state of the multicast router.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the multicast router.
